name: steamos-desktop-control-center
description: SteamOS desktop control center for system updates, plugin updates, and BIOS channel switching.

scripts.check: node --check src/main/main.js && node --check src/main/preload.js && node --check src/main/services/steamosService.js && node --check src/main/services/platform.js && node --check src/main/services/stateStore.js && node --check src/main/services/adapters/systemAdapter.js && node --check src/main/services/adapters/pluginAdapter.js && node --check src/main/services/adapters/biosAdapter.js && node --check src/renderer/app.js
